question_frequency.rationale: The Pair never asks the user any didactic questions. It writes the full solution, explains it, then answers the user's questions. No teachable-moment prompts are surfaced.

question_quality.rationale: Since there are essentially no Pair-initiated questions or framed choices, there is nothing of substance to evaluate. The Pair just delivers a complete solution.

scaffolding.rationale: There is no progression of pedagogical questions. The explanations themselves are well-organized (offset math, edge cases, algebra of decode), but scaffolding requires guided discovery, which is absent.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is warm and the explanations are clear and actionable, with a nice algebra trace showing why round-trip works. Flow is natural but one-directional — Pair lectures, user confirms.

effectiveness.rationale: Final code is essentially identical to the baseline (same _shift_char/encode/decode structure) and correctly meets all requirements.

friction.rationale: Two turns, ~50s, comparable to baseline. Slightly more user-driven exploration of negative shifts but similar overall length and payoff.
